rows.label: qev019301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yo, [ST:playername ]... You've got that same
smug face as always.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0002
rows.name:
You're still snatching customers from my Research Data
Probes to do your business, aren't ya?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0011
rows.name:
State that you are merely earning income
through legitimate means.

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0021
rows.name:
State that you are not seeking cash
in a situation like this.

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0003
rows.name:
You think you're a righteous person? I won't forgive
a self-righteous bastard like you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0004
rows.name: Is it evil for a starving kid to snatch bread from the rich?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Then are you telling me to die for the sake of righteousness?!
Just shut up and remove every single one of your
annoying Data Probes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0006
rows.name:
That pisses me off even more. I won't forgive a hypocritical
bastard like you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0007
rows.name:
You can't do anything without cash, whether it's surviving
day to day or shooting a single bullet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0008
rows.name:
If you're saying you don't need it... remove your annoying
Data Probes right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0009
rows.name: Nah... you'll just defy me again if I say that, won't ya?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Hah! I know! Deep down, you want cash so badly you
can't stand it either![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0011
rows.name: ...Then, let's settle this properly this time, eh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Since then, I've gone around installing Research Data
Probes in various places across Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0013
rows.name:
I won't suffer a pathetic loss like last time!
This time for sure, the winner is the boss![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0014
rows.name:
How about it, you in? I ain't running away anymore!
If I lose, I'll listen to whatever you say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Bring it on, you thieving bastard. Then answer one
question before the match.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0016
rows.name: For what purpose are you expanding Frontier Net on Mira?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0017
rows.name:
I don't wanna hear any of that superficial crap about
it being for the future of Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0018
rows.name:
I wanna know what you're truly seeking.
I don't need half-assed lies, tell me the truth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0030
rows.name: The Future of Earthlings

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0031
rows.name:
Look back at him directly and say it is
to protect the future of Earthlings.

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0040
rows.name: Cash

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0041
rows.name:
Honestly reveal that there is something
you desperately want to buy.

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0019
rows.name: Haha! That's exactly why I can't trust you or Kirsty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0020
rows.name:
I've got something I have to give form to by earning, and
earning, and earning tons of cash![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0021
rows.name:
I ain't losing to a flighty bastard like you!
I'll show you an overwhelming difference![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0022
rows.name:
I see... you seem to be a slightly different breed from
that Kirsty...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0023
rows.name:
But! I also have something massive I wanna get with the
cash I earn![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0024
rows.name:
I ain't planning on losing when it comes to the size of
our greed! I'll show you an overwhelming difference![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0025
rows.name:
I've been eating off this for ages. There's no way I'm
losing to a rookie bastard like you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Target tourism revenue: 130000G!! I'll run Frontier Net at
full capacity and earn it in no time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0027
rows.name:
Ever since losing to you, I've run all over Mira installing
Data Probes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0028
rows.name: There's no way I'll lose...! Hey! Tell me your earnings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0029
rows.name: ...Wait, what?! What did you say!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0030
rows.name:
Why the hell do you jump over the number I hammered
out so easily?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0031
rows.name: Just who the hell are you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0050
rows.name: Ostentation

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0051
rows.name:
Declare that you are a pioneer who will
carve open all of Mira.

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0060
rows.name: Humility

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0061
rows.name:
Modestly state that you are nothing but
a mere BLADE.

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0032
rows.name: You talk big... but it's a fact you hammered out that number.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0033
rows.name:
There's no way a mere BLADE could surpass the great
Tobias so easily...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0034
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Shit! I ain't losing! It's a bit dangerous, but I have a
plan for a one-shot reversal...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0035
rows.name:
I'll plant Data Probes all over their stronghold in
Kurogane no Tairiku and rake in the cash![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0036
rows.name: ...It's you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0037
rows.name:
Heh... go ahead and laugh. I came aiming for a one-shot
reversal, but the Bellowing Vainamo got me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0038
rows.name:
And that clingy bastard is still prowling around here,
aiming for me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0039
rows.name:
Guess he's starving. Starving and seeking, a persistent
bastard just like me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0070
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0071
rows.name: Gently express concern for the wounded Tobias.

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0080
rows.name: Advice

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0081
rows.name: Sternly advise him to survive no matter what happens.

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0040
rows.name:
You're a real softie, you know that? Gonna get your feet
swept out from under you someday.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0041
rows.name: Squawking at every little thing like my old lady...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0042
rows.name: Well, advice is free. I'll take what I can get.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0043
rows.name: I'll hold my breath as best I can so he doesn't notice me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0044
rows.name:
...You watch your back too. You ain't getting off easy if
he finds you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0045
rows.name:
The Bellowing Vainamo[ST:wide ]—
I was supposed to defeat that thing and surpass you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0046
rows.name:
I knew it was reckless, but that's what a gamble is.
Can't be helped if I wanna grab the cash.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0047
rows.name:
...But I lost the bet. Just abandon a loser like me and go
wherever you want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0048
rows.name: His signal disappeared...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0049
rows.name:
Hey, you... don't tell me you defeated that
Bellowing Vainamo?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0090
rows.name: Ostentation

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0091
rows.name: Proudly state that it was not a big deal.

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0100
rows.name: Humility

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0101
rows.name:
Frankly state that it was a tough fight,
but you somehow managed to win.

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0066
rows.name: Son of a bitch... I was competing against a real monster...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0050
rows.name:
Makes sense. Even running all over Mira, I've never seen
something that strong...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0051
rows.name:
...Shit! I admit it, it's my total defeat! I won't get in your
way ever again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0052
rows.name:
Install Research Data Probes wherever you want and
earn more than ever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0053
rows.name:
Yeah! And... you're my boss! I'll listen to whatever
you say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0054
rows.name:
What'll you do? Steal my cash? Or work me to the bone
until I collapse puking blood?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0110
rows.name: Order

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0111
rows.name:
Order him to contribute to the people
as a member of BLADE.

rows.label: qev019301_JNK0120
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev019301_SEL0121
rows.name:
Instead, ask him why he is so obsessed
with money.

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0055
rows.name: ...Seriously... what a total softie...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0056
rows.name:
Looking at you reminds me of the folks who picked me up
and brought me aboard the White Whale...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0057
rows.name:
That's right... I have to bring the project those softies left
behind to fruition no matter what...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0058
rows.name:
I can't be spacing out in a place like this.
I gotta earn even a little bit of cash...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0059
rows.name: Are you... fine with just that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0060
rows.name:
Earning and earning using Frontier Net... Earning a
massive amount of... cash...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0061
rows.name:
I have to bring the project my comrades left behind
to fruition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0062
rows.name:
It costs an astronomical amount of cash. That's why I
have to keep earning, no matter who curses me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0063
rows.name:
It's classified, so this is all I can say here... but it's
definitely not a bad thing for humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0064
rows.name:
...Well, I'm going. Even if you don't have demands,
a loss is a loss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019301_MSG0065
rows.name: I'll pay a commensurate amount. Take this.[ST:wait ]
